indications.text:
1.1 Rheumatoid Arthritis
XELJANZ tablets and XELJANZ XR (extended-release tablets) are indicated for the treatment
of adult patients with moderately to severely active rheumatoid arthritis (RA), who have had an
inadequate response or intolerance to one or more TNF blockers.
Limitations of Use

moderately to severely active rheumatoid arthritis who have had an inadequate response or
intolerance to methotrexate. It may be used as monotherapy or in combination with
